name: Kitchen Sink Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat butter and light brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add vanilla; beat well.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. In another bowl, combine flour, oatmeal, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Add the flour mixture to the butter mixture. Blend well.
6. Fold in raisins and chocolate chips. Mix thoroughly.
7. Drop by rounded teaspoons onto ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 8-10 minutes. Do not overbake!
